title: goniophlebium ensiforme
intro: Goniophlebium ensiforme, a type of fern known for its distinctive ensiform or sword-shaped leaves, is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium ensiforme are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used in infusions or teas, or made into tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
